live.title: Wheel Of Fortune
live.shortDescription: Recognised by Guinness World Records as the world’s most popular TV game show, Wheel of Fortune arrives in India in spectacular fashion, hosted by Akshay Kumar. Contestants enter a thrilling word game, decoding phrases spanning Bollywood, pop culture and everyday life. Blending entertainment with edge-of-the-seat moments, every alphabet can change the game as players compete for paisa and prizes.
live.longDescription: Recognised by Guinness World Records as the world’s most popular TV game show, Wheel of Fortune arrives in India in spectacular fashion, hosted by Akshay Kumar. Contestants enter a thrilling word game, decoding phrases spanning Bollywood, pop culture and everyday life. Blending entertainment with edge-of-the-seat moments, every alphabet can change the game as players compete for paisa and prizes.

upcoming.title: Sitaare Zameen Par
upcoming.shortDescription: After a DUI, an arrogant basketball coach must train neurodivergent adults for community service. His initial prejudice fades as his players show him a new perspective on life. Catch Sitaare Zameen Par streaming from 3rd April, only on Sony LIV.
upcoming.longDescription: After a DUI, an arrogant basketball coach must train neurodivergent adults for community service. His initial prejudice fades as his players show him a new perspective on life. Catch Sitaare Zameen Par streaming from 3rd April, only on Sony LIV.

upcoming.title: Hastinapur Ke Veer
upcoming.shortDescription: A mythological TV series, Hastinapur Ke Veer is centered around themes of courage, discipline, brotherhood, and timeless values, drawing inspiration from the Mahabharata era.
upcoming.longDescription: A mythological TV series, Hastinapur Ke Veer is centered around themes of courage, discipline, brotherhood, and timeless values, drawing inspiration from the Mahabharata era.
